nasb.text: He struck down their vines also and their fig trees, And shattered the trees of their territory.

esv.text: He struck down their vines and fig trees, and shattered the trees of their country.

cnv.text: 他擊打他們的葡萄樹和無花果樹， 又毀壞他們境內的樹木。

ccb.text: 祂击倒他们的葡萄树和无花果树， 摧毁他们境内的树木。

csbs.text: 他击打他们的葡萄树和无花果树， 打断他们境内的树木。
